# Well Bore Stability

**Summary**: The study of the mechanical integrity of a wellbore during drilling and production.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-aldossary|AlDossary, 2018]] focused on wellbore stability in depleted sandstone reservoirs.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2018-aldossary|AlDossary, 2018]] ['stress rotation', 'pore pressure depletion', 'wellbore collapse']

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2018-aldossary|AlDossary, 2018]] ['finite-element-modeling', '3D geomechanical modeling']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Depletion leads to stress changes that can cause casing shear or wellbore collapse. ([[2018-aldossary|AlDossary, 2018, p. 16]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2018-aldossary|AlDossary, 2018]] Predicting mud weight windows in depleted zones.
